hero.label: INTERNATIONAL NGO
hero.description: TESSIPI Foundation works for equity, safety and support of vulnerable communities around the world.

about.label: WHO WE ARE
about.title: A foundation committed to a fairer world
about.p1: TESSIPI Foundation (Transformative Equity, Safety & Support Initiative for Inclusive Progress) is an international NGO founded in 2008, dedicated to humanitarian aid and sustainable development.
about.p2: We operate in 12 countries through programs in health, education, protection and support for vulnerable communities.

humanity.title: Humanity
humanity.description: Act with compassion to relieve human suffering.

protection.title: Protection
protection.description: Defend the most vulnerable and their fundamental rights.

inclusion.title: Inclusion
inclusion.description: Promote equity and access for all, without discrimination.

solidarity.title: Solidarity
solidarity.description: Unite our forces for lasting and transformative impact.

actions.label: OUR ACTIONS
actions.title: Programs that change lives
actions.description: TESSIPI Foundation operates in 6 priority areas to meet the essential needs of vulnerable communities around the world.

health.title: Health & Well-being
health.description: Medical consultations, vaccinations, screening campaigns and mobile clinics in remote areas. We train community health workers to ensure continuous follow-up.

nutrition.title: Nutrition & Food
nutrition.description: Distribution of food kits, nutritional supplementation programs for children and pregnant women, and education on healthy eating practices.

education.title: Education & Development
education.description: Building schools, training teachers, distributing school supplies and adult literacy programs. Education is the key to autonomy.

protection.title: Protection & Inclusion
protection.description: Protection of vulnerable populations, defense of human rights, support for refugees and displaced people. Creation of safe spaces for women and children.

water.title: Water, Hygiene & Sanitation
water.description: Drilling wells, installing water pumps, building latrines and raising awareness of hygiene practices. Access to drinking water is a fundamental right.

emergency.title: Emergency & Rehabilitation
emergency.description: Rapid response to natural disasters or conflicts, distribution of emergency aid, and rehabilitation programs for community reconstruction.

engage.label: GET INVOLVED
engage.title: Join the action
engage.description: In any way you can — your time, your skills or your support.

donate.title: Make a donation
donate.description: Fund care days, meals and supplies. Every contribution reaches a family directly.

partner.title: Become a partner
partner.description: Institutions, companies or NGOs: join us to amplify our humanitarian impact.

volunteer.title: Become a volunteer
volunteer.description: Join a clinic day or mentor a new health worker. Your time changes lives.

member.title: Become a member
member.description: Join the TESSIPI community and take an active part in our humanitarian work.

transparency.label: TRANSPARENCY
transparency.title: Trust built on transparency
transparency.description: An NGO's credibility rests on its openness. Browse our reports and policies to understand how we work.

reports.title: Activity reports
reports.description: Read our annual reports detailing our actions and results.

financial.title: Financial reports
financial.description: Full transparency on how funds are used.

safeguard.title: Beneficiary safeguarding
safeguard.description: Our policy to protect vulnerable populations.

donation.title: Make a donation
donation.subtitle: Every contribution, no matter the size, transforms lives.
donation.highlight: 87% of your donations go directly to our programs on the ground.
donation.note: Secure payment • Tax-deductible donations • Cancel anytime

clinic.title: Opening of a new clinic in East Africa
clinic.excerpt: TESSIPI Foundation opens a new pediatric clinic that will care for more than 5,000 children per year.

training.excerpt: Join our virtual training program to become a certified TESSIPI community health worker.

testimony.title: How a screening saved a school year
testimony.excerpt: Amina's story: a young girl whose life was transformed thanks to a simple vision screening.

impact.description: Concrete results that reflect our commitment alongside vulnerable communities.
